data.title: A game of slips between flawed sides

data.title: Langer defends Pooran call after Super Over failure
data.summary: Nicholas Pooran's lean run continued with a first-ball dismissal in the Super Over, but Justin Langer insisted the numbers and matchup against Sunil Narine justified the decision

data.title: The first quarter horror show that undid CSK
data.summary: The result was a foregone conclusion the moment CSK were reduced to 43/4 after the first ten overs

data.title: Rinku Singh headlines KKR's Super Over victory
data.summary: Mohsin Khan picked a fifer, but LSG lost steam in a relatively small chase, and came apart in the Super Over

data.title: Punch-drunk Delhi Capitals face RCB test after short turnaround
data.summary: The holders will look to settle scores after losing the reverse fixture in Benglauru last week

data.title: Data Shorts: Rabada rediscovers his new-ball magic
data.summary: Rabada's pace-driven resurgence has turned the Powerplay into a strength for Gujarat Titans once again

data.title: Setback during warm-up game delays Dhoni's return
data.summary: Initially it was reported that the former captain would be out of action only for the first two weeks

data.title: Rabada, Sudharsan hand CSK another home defeat
data.summary: Ruturaj Gaikwad's maiden half-century of the season in vain as CSK's 158 proves insufficient

data.title: 'He's my new favourite player' - Cummins on Sooryavanshi
